en.extract:
The Javan munia (Lonchura leucogastroides) is a species of estrildid finch native to southern Sumatra, Java, Bali and Lombok islands in Indonesia. It was introduced in Singapore and the Malay Peninsula; It inhabits subtropical and tropical dry shrubland and grassland habitat. It has been assessed as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List.
The Javan munia is known to feed on algae.

The '''Javan munia''' ('''''Lonchura leucogastroides''''') is a species of [[estrildid finch]] native to southern [[Sumatra]], [[Java]], [[Bali]] and [[Lombok]] islands in [[Indonesia]]. It was introduced in [[Singapore]] and the Malay Peninsula;<ref>{{cite journal|url=http://orientalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2013/01/Javan-Munia.pdf|journal=Forktail|volume=28|date=2012|pages=159–160|author=Tim Robinson|title=First records of Javan Munia Lonchura leucogastroides in Peninsular Malaysia|access-date=22 March 2022}}</ref> It inhabits subtropical and tropical dry shrubland and grassland habitat. It has been assessed as [[Least Concern]] on the [[IUCN Red List]].<ref name=iucn/>

The Javan munia is known to feed on algae.<ref>{{cite journal |author1=Darjono|name-list-style=amp |author2=Prawiradilaga, D.M. |author3=Sudaryanti |year=1989 |title=First record of algae in the diet of Java Munia (''Lonchura leucogastroides'') and Nutmeg Mannikin (''Lonchura'') in Indonesia |journal=Ekologi Indonesia |volume=1 |issue=3 |pages=70–71}}</ref>

zh.extract:
黑喉文鸟（学名：Lonchura leucogastroides）是梅花雀科文鸟属的一种，分布于马来西亚（引进种）、印度尼西亚和新加坡（引进种）。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
黑喉文鸟的平均体重约为11.7克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原、乡村花园、耕地和亚热带或热带的（低地）干燥疏灌丛。


参考文献

Lonchura leucogastroides. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27].
